title: Undertale & Deltarune SoundPack
description: This is a resource pack that changes most if not all of the music- besides disks- to Deltarune and Undertale OSTs
body: This is a resource pack that changes most if not all of the music- besides disks- to Deltarune and Undertale OSTs. They are also put in convenient spots, for example; In the nether, one of the songs that play is Another Medium. Im still working on adding the rest, i just need to figure out where exactly to put them.
